products.name: Dehydrated Onion
products.short: Dehydrated White / Red / Pink / Yellow Onions
products.description: Dehydrated onion in multiple cuts and formats for the food industry.
products.packaging: 14 kg strong poly bag inside carton or as per client requirement

spec.aroma: Strong aroma — characteristic of Indian origin products
spec.packing: 14 kg strong poly bag inside carton (custom packing available)
spec.note: Onion products available in multiple colours and cut forms. All products can be supplied as per customized cut size and specification. Specification available on request.

variants.label: Flakes
variants.description: Thin, crispy onion flakes suitable for soups, snack mixes and seasoning blends.
variants.packaging: 14 kg poly bag inside cartons; retail sachets available

variants.label: Chopped
variants.description: Uniform chopped onion pieces for ready-to-use culinary applications.
variants.packaging: 10–14 kg poly-lined bags or 25 kg cartons

variants.label: Minced
variants.description: Fine minced particles ideal for sauces, dressings and instant soups.
variants.packaging: 10–14 kg bags; retail and industrial packing available

variants.label: Granules
variants.description: Coarse granules for textured seasonings and industrial blends.
variants.packaging: 25 kg bulk bags or 10 kg consumer packs

variants.label: Powder
variants.description: Fine onion powder (80-100 mesh) for seasoning, flavoring and seasoning blends.
variants.packaging: 25 kg lined bags or bulk tanker loads for large orders

products.name: Dehydrated Garlic
products.description: Aromatic dehydrated garlic in various cuts and grinds.
products.packaging: 25 kg strong poly bag inside carton or as per client requirement

spec.aroma: Strong aroma — characteristic of Indian origin products
spec.packing: 25 kg strong poly bag inside carton (custom packing available)
spec.note: Garlic flakes size not specified; other sizes follow standard product size chart.

variants.label: Flakes
variants.description: Aromatic garlic flakes for snack mixes and ready-to-use seasoning blends.
variants.packaging: 25 kg poly-lined bags or retail sachets

variants.label: Chopped
variants.description: Coarsely chopped garlic for culinary use and further processing.
variants.packaging: 10–25 kg bags depending on client requirements

variants.label: Minced
variants.description: Fine minced garlic for sauces, pastes and instant mixes.
variants.packaging: 10–14 kg bags for foodservice and industrial users

variants.label: Granules
variants.description: Granulated garlic for consistent dosing in manufacturing.
variants.packaging: 25 kg bulk bags or 1–5 kg retail packs

variants.label: Powder
variants.description: Garlic powder (80-100 mesh) with preserved aroma for seasoning.
variants.packaging: 25 kg lined bags for industrial use; retail packs available

products.name: Dehydrated Spices & Powders

variants.label: Ginger Powder

variants.label: Tomato Powder

variants.packaging: 25 kg bulk bags or vacuum-sealed retail pouches

variants.label: Lemon Powder
variants.description: Zesty lemon powder with preserved citrus aroma.
variants.packaging: 10–25 kg lined bags

variants.label: Tamarind Powder
variants.description: Tamarind powder for sour notes in sauces and condiments.
variants.packaging: 25 kg poly-lined bags

variants.label: Powder

variants.packaging: Bulk or retail as per client requirement

products.name: Peanuts
